<findings>

[observation] [info] High cohesion (0.99) — files are tightly interconnected

</findings>

<insights>

- High cohesion (0.99) — files are tightly interconnected
- Guard the `server/routes-adaptive.ts` responders with contract tests so CLI-triggered workflows and HTTP paths stay aligned as integrations grow.
- Centralize dependency injection in `server/mcp-deps.ts` to make onboarding new gateways a config change instead of touching multiple entrypoints.
- Extend `schema/data-files.ts` linting so publishing data models from the CLI matches the server validation rules.
- Zone shows excellent cohesion (0.99) and minimal outward coupling (0.01), so continuing to keep adapters and ports behind gateway abstractions will preserve the clean runtime boundary.
- Twenty-one direct invocations into packages-rex:rex-cli put the rex automation details inside the gateway instead of hiding behind a thin adapter, so CLI churn will keep forcing server rewrites.
- [call graph] 990 internal calls, 21 outgoing, 1 incoming (cohesion: 0.98, coupling: 0.02)

</insights>
